currentStageTitle: Stage V3.1-M2-CHECKPOINT — Gate-1 re-review of M2 + the true 8-spoke board (T-207). M2.5 is CLOSED (T-228, 2026-07-20): the true 8-spoke 21-node board shipped (T-222…T-225), sim/harness are regression-clean (T-226), and the fresh T-227 baseline REPLACES the voided §9 lock (band misses recorded, zero tunable-value edits). See docs/ROADMAP-V3.1-UI.md §M2.5/§M2 + TASKS.md (T-207, T-229).
nextAction: T-228 DONE (M2.5 CLOSED): verify green, M2.5 boxes ticked in both roadmaps, currentStage repointed V3.1-M2.5 → V3.1-M2-CHECKPOINT, dated ROADMAP-V3 §8 entry added; zero engine/tunable/asset edits (docs + state.json only). Next is T-229 — regenerate the m2 gallery (`npm run shots:v3 -- --out docs/Redesign-V3.1/m2`), commit, then HALT with T-207 BLOCKED(awaiting user visual review) for the Gate-1 re-review. Do NOT self-approve T-207 or advance into M3 — the checkpoint flip is user-only. T-227 (DONE 2026-07-20): the fresh 2-seed balance READING on the 21-node board is RECORDED (measurement, zero tuning). Canonical sweep (seeds 20260622+20260628, n=40, 2/3/4p, both modes) → new run dir sim-results/v3-21node-baseline-n40/ (4 sub-runs + combined REPORT with delta table + tunable-vs-structural assessment); dated ROADMAP-V3 §8 entry added; old 17-node lock dirs restored intact as the regression gate. RESULT: pooled dark win 53.4%/52.3% (+34pp vs the voided 18.9/18.3% lock), doom/attrition split 53.1/0.3 & 52.0/0.2 (doom +34.9pp, attrition -0.8pp), rounds 10.62/10.68, captures 1.32/1.42 (economy ALIVE), capture->ransom-back 33.1/35.6%; BP triple 33.1/62.8/79.3 & 36.1/59.7/81.1 (traitor win ~doubled). ASSESSMENT: the two 4-spoke failure modes are NOT present (attrition share FELL to 0.5%; capture economy healthy) — the miss is STRUCTURAL doom-pacing (the +4 mid-belt nodes + 8 blight seams give a denser/faster doom front; doom completes 3x more often and sooner), NOT a clean single-knob band-recenter; a real re-lock needs a topology-aware doom recalibration deferred to post-playtest/V4. Zero engine/tunable/data edits. T-226 (DONE 2026-07-20): AUDIT + regression-guard — the v3 sim/harness/AI/Shadowking areas were already generalized in T-222/T-223/T-224 (BFS `firstStepTowardNode` navigation traverses the new mid nodes; shadowking-policy routes through board-derived getKeepForQuadrant/getForgeForQuadrant/getApproachForQuadrant/getSpokePath; claimValue keys off tier). Re-ran both audit greps: zero node-id literals, zero ===3|4 / distance / .quadrant / %4 assumptions, no real Math.random. No src change needed or made. Added a {2,3,4}p×{competitive,blood_pact} termination-matrix guard in sim-driver.test.ts (asserts hitGuard===false) and a harness create→run_ai smoke over the same 6 cells; `npm run sim:v3 -- 20260622 2` and `--bloodpact` both exit 0 (rounds 9.9/11.0/11.8 under the 14 cap), harness ok. Band misses (SK 34/49/50%) EXPECTED — owned by T-227, recorded-not-tuned. Zero engine/tunable/data edits. For reference the earlier board build: T-222 forked data/board-v3.json (+4 cardinal mid-belt nodes mid-n/e/s/w feeding src/v3/board.gen.ts, v2 untouched), T-223 untangled the 4-fold type/setup assumptions, T-224 added blight seams for 8 rays, T-225 rendered 21 nodes. Then after T-227: T-228 (M2.5 DoD → currentStage V3.1-M2-CHECKPOINT), T-229 (regenerate gallery, then HALT with T-207 BLOCKED). M2.5 guardrails (ROADMAP-V3.1-UI §3, 2026-07-20 exception): engine topology MAY change under the dated exception but tunable VALUES stay frozen (src/v3/tunables.ts / tunables.gen.ts untouched — a diff touching any tunable value is forbidden); the balance §9 lock is voided and replaced by the T-227 baseline, band misses recorded not tuned; all other V3.1 guardrails still hold (fog D2 to presentation, instant mode, no Math.random, pinned gsap+howler, CC0/CC-BY committed assets in docs/CREDITS.md).

sim-results/sample-v3/REPORT.md (herald-OFF default reference); the T2-V 40-seed run dirs sim-results/v3-s20260622-n40{,-bp,-herald} + sim-results/v3-s20260717-n40{,-bp}
docs/human-playtest-checklist-v3.md + docs/v3-teach-script.md (the V3-6 playtest walkthrough + teaching script); index-v3.html + src/ui-v3 (the fog-respecting render-from-state UI)
invariants: All mutation goes through applyCommand (src/v3/reducer.ts) — no direct state mutation elsewhere
No Math.random / Date.now / any under src/ — all RNG via SeededRandom (ALGORITHM §7) (engine+sim scoped for src/ui-v3 — see the dated scoping decision below)

2026-07-18 — Determinism invariant SCOPED (V3.1 sprint; docs/ROADMAP-V3.1-UI.md §3): the 'no Math.random/Date.now under src/' rule is ENGINE+SIM scoped (src/v2, src/v3, src/utils). The presentation layer (src/ui-v3) MAY use requestAnimationFrame / GSAP internal timing, but still NO Math.random — presentational jitter uses a dedicated SeededRandom instance that never touches GameState — and no timing value ever feeds back into game state or commands.

Determinism §7 D1–D9: tokens are pre-bound & fogged via a namespaced SeededRandom(hash(seed, nodeId)) (D1/D9); observableState(state, viewerSeat) redacts token content AND the seed (D2) — it never leaks unflipped tokens or the seed; AI/human/wraith all decide from observableState (a pure f(observableState, seed))

Balance is LOCKED at the T2-3 herald-OFF numbers — no edits to src/v3/tunables.ts / tunables.gen.ts / any tunable value; band misses are recorded, never tuned (LOCK VOIDED for M2.5 topology only — see the dated scoping decision below)

2026-07-20 — Balance LOCK VOIDED for M2.5 (topology only), USER-AUTHORIZED (ROADMAP-V3.1-UI §3 dated exception, T-221): the true 8-spoke board (data/board.json 17 → 21 nodes) is a different game than the 17-node board the §9 lock measured, so the topology change itself voids the lock; a fresh 2-seed baseline (T-227) is recorded as the NEW baseline that REPLACES it, and every band miss is recorded, not tuned. This exception is TOPOLOGY-ONLY: NO tunable-VALUE edits — src/v3/tunables.ts and tunables.gen.ts stay untouched, and any diff touching a tunable value remains forbidden. Re-establishing the §9 bands on the new board is post-playtest/V4 work.
Blood Pact (flag on) only: an eliminated traitor still wins on a later doom/attrition (the win-check reads bloodPactHolder regardless of elimination); competitive mode (flag off) is byte-identical
gotchas: vitest output buffers when piped through `tail` — redirect to a file, or use the JSON reporter (verify.mjs does)
Run `npm run verify` to (re)populate the lastVerified block; never hand-edit lastVerified/dirty (script-owned by verify.mjs)

verify.mjs now lints `eslint src/ tests/` (whole repo) and runs `vitest run tests` (the FULL suite — utils/v2/v3, all green, ~1,14x tests). The v3 UI lives in src/ui-v3 (entry index-v3.html) and IS in scope; tsc --noEmit covers all of src/. Validate UI changes with `npm run dev` / `npx vite build`.

ACTION pointer quirk (inherited from v2): after the LAST player in turnOrder exhausts actions, advanceActivePlayer leaves activePlayerIndex ON that player (turnOrderPosition === turnOrder.length). Any per-player action loop must ALSO stop on actionsRemaining===0, not just the index — else it re-enters a 0-action player (runAITurn handles this).

BUNDLE BUDGET: `npm run budget` (scripts/check-budget.mjs, T-206) guards the ≤3 MB M2 exit metric. It runs a CLEAN `vite build` itself (emptyOutDir wipes stale `tsc` output) and measures the resulting dist/ (~444 KB, ~2.6 MB headroom). NEVER measure dist/ after `npm run build`/`tsc` — that leaves ~3 MB of compiled-JS noise and would falsely fail.

BYTE-IDENTICAL SCOPE: the competitive (flag-off) sim is byte-identical to sim-results/sample-v3; the difficulty `warlord` tier = the DEFAULT = the locked balance (byte-identical, re-verified). The two sim-neutral human-only commands SET_WRAITH_INPUT / SET_BEQUEST are UI-only and do NOT perturb the sim. Herald default-OFF (3-archetype); enabling Herald+PARLEY is the advanced path.
openRisks: DATA/*.JSON DRIFT (v3 data split owed) — data/tunables.json + data/archetypes.json still list removed Broken/Rescue levers (e.g. rescueWillingness); these are INERT (the v3 engine reads src/v3/tunables.gen.ts, not data/). A `npm run gen:data` resync is owed once v3 gets its own data/ dir. The 4 court tunables (MARSHAL_POWER / STEWARD_POWER / HERALD_PIECE_POWER / STEWARD_INCOME) + the T2 literals are plain literals in src/v3/tunables.ts pending that split. (ROADMAP-V3 §0 recorded debt.)

DIFFICULTY-TIER MAGNITUDES STALE POST-T2-1 — the knight/squire tier magnitudes are stale after T2-1 (feed-the-court); tier monotonicity is test-verified, but recalibrate at the next difficulty-touching stage (the V3-6 playtest picks the shipped default). (ROADMAP-V3 §8 T2-1.)
T2-4 WRAITH IS PLAYTEST-GATED — the Wraith re-tune awaits the human playtest signal; not scheduled as sim work. (ROADMAP-V3 §8 T2-3.)

T2-V FRESH-SEED BP-EXPOSURE EDGE (user call) — fresh seed 20260717 read BP exposure 71.4% (+1.4pp over the 40–70 ceiling) with traitor-win healthy mid-band (16.4%); recorded-not-tuned per the fresh-seed band-miss protocol. T-004 is set BLOCKED for the user to decide whether a +1.4pp fresh-seed exposure edge warrants action. (ROADMAP-V3 §8 2026-07-17 T2-V.)

MEASURED 2026-07-20 (T-227) — POST-TOPOLOGY BALANCE, recorded-not-tuned. The 21-node true 8-spoke board voids the old §9 lock; the fresh 2-seed baseline (sim-results/v3-21node-baseline-n40/) REPLACES it. Competitive pooled dark win 53.4%/52.3% (+34pp vs the 18.9/18.3% voided lock), doom/attrition 53.1/0.3 & 52.0/0.2 (doom +34.9pp; attrition FELL to 0.5% share), rounds 10.62/10.68, captures 1.32/1.42 with 33.1/35.6% ransom-back (capture economy HEALTHY); BP triple traitor-win/exposure/accuracy 33.1/62.8/79.3 & 36.1/59.7/81.1 (traitor win ~doubled). VERDICT: the miss is STRUCTURAL doom-pacing, NOT the two named 4-spoke failure modes (attrition-dominant wins = NO, attrition share dropped; dead capture economy = NO, alive) — the +4 mid-belt nodes + 8 blight seams give the dark a denser/faster doom front (doom completes 3x more often, sooner). A re-lock to 18-22% is NOT a clean single-knob tunable; it needs a topology-aware doom recalibration, DEFERRED to post-playtest/V4 (out of M2.5 scope). Zero tunable-VALUE edits this milestone.

RESOLVED 2026-07-20 (T-225 fix round 1) — SHOTS:V3 WRAITH SCENE POST-TOPOLOGY: `npm run shots:v3` was exiting 1 ('MISSING 1 screen(s): wraith') because the T-222/T-224 21-node topology shifted every seed's trajectory and the old SEED_LIST no longer contained a seed producing a mid-game Warlord elimination (the Wraith scene's precondition — the board now typically doom-completes in MARCH before RECKONING, and RECKONING_AUTOPRESSURE_NODES=0 means no executioner). FIX: appended a deterministic covering seed (24) to SEED_LIST in scripts/shots-v3.mjs (a rival falls at round 7/MARCH → the live Wraiths sidebar renders → wraith captures); driver policy untouched, zero engine/tunable/data changes. shots:v3 now captures 7/7 and exits 0, stable across four runs. NOTE (T-227 measured 2026-07-20): the T-227 baseline confirms the topology shifted the game toward fast doom-completion (eliminations/game fell 0.20 → ~0.05, last_standing 9.8% → ~2.2%, RECKONING-reaching rarer) — so the eliminated-HUMAN `.wraith-input` afterlife scene is a genuinely rarer state on the 21-node board; the shots gate stays satisfied via the rival-wraith `.wraith-list` path. Re-establishing the elimination/attrition balance is part of the deferred post-playtest/V4 doom recalibration, not this milestone.
